commands.payload:
DatabaseManager 1.0.57540
Copyright (C) 2026 Logic Software, Inc.

  runscript         runs specified sql script

  run-migrations    runs database migration on specified database

  help              Display more information on a specific command.

  version           Display version information.

result.stderr:
DatabaseManager 1.0.57540
Copyright (C) 2026 Logic Software, Inc.

  -m, --migrations           Required. Directory that contains sql migrations.

  -t, --target-version       Target db version.If not specified then database
                             will be migrated to the latest version.Example:
                             10.2.3.5

  -c, --connection-string    Required. Connection strings to the target database

  -d, --database             Allows to override target database from
                             connection-string

  --help                     Display this help screen.

  --version                  Display version information.

result.stderr:
DatabaseManager 1.0.57540
Copyright (C) 2026 Logic Software, Inc.

  -f, --file                 Required. Input scripts

  -p, --param                Parameter for script in format 'name:value'. For
                             example -p addDemoData:1

  -c, --connection-string    Required. Connection strings to the target database

  -d, --database             Allows to override target database from
                             connection-string

  --help                     Display this help screen.

  --version                  Display version information.
